subcodes.first_line: O bird soaring in the heights of the love of God! Now, in Alexandria of Egypt, at the break of dawn, have I taken up my pen to write this letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طائره اوج محبت الله الان در اسکندریه مصر در دم صبح بتحریر این نامه پرداختم اشعار بدیع
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @East and West; communication between East and West
